title: calophyllum sundaicum
intro: Calophyllum sundaicum, also known as Nyatoh or Bintangor, is a tropical tree species native to Southeast Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of calophyllic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Calophyllum sundaicum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal remedies, including extracts, oils, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
